title: diastema molle
intro: Diastema molle, a climbing woody vine native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Diastema molle include its ability to act as a vasodilator, reducing blood pressure and improving circulation, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Diastema molle is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or ointment, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues.
